CONTENT.Club career: Born in Odesa, Vivcharnko is a product of Chornomorets Odesa and Dynamo Kyiv academies. He played initially for Dynamo Kyiv in the Ukrainian Premier League Reserves.In August 2020, he was promoted to the senior squad, and was an unused substitution player in the winning Ukrainian Super Cup match against Shakhtar Donetsk on 25 August 2020. Vivcharenko made his debut for Dynamo Kyiv only on 27 July 2022, playing as an extra-time substitution player in a winning match against Turkish club Fenerbahçe in the 2022–23 UEFA Champions League second qualifying round.
CONTENT.External links: Kostyantyn Vivcharenko at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)Kostyantyn Vivcharenko at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Kostyantyn Ruslanovych Vivcharenko (Ukrainian: Костянтин Русланович Вівчаренко; born 10 June 2002) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a left-back for Ukrainian Premier League club Dynamo Kyiv.
